image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: Science has a clearer story about C diff risk than social media does.
Context visual: C diff is a dangerous bacteria that can cause severe diarrhea and more.
Escalation visual: But what really increases your risk? Antibiotics play a huge role.
Evidence visual: Studies show that taking antibiotics disrupts gut health, allowing C diff to thrive.
Payoff visual: Not everyone is at equal risk; age and underlying health matters too.
Cta visual: Stay informed. Follow for more science-based health insights.
